Gelonium multiflorum, commonly known as Gelonium, is a plant species that belongs to the Apocynaceae family. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include the treatment of various health conditions such as fever, cough, and respiratory infections, thanks to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties.
